name: SMB Create Remote File Admin Share
notes:
This rule detects non-system accounts SMB accessing a file with write (0x2) access mask via administrative share (i.e C$).

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jose Rodriguez (@Cyb3rPandaH), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: SMB Create Remote File Admin Share
SIGMA Description: Look for non-system accounts SMB accessing a file with write (0x2) access mask via administrative share (i.e C$).


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
when the event matches LOWER("Share Full Full Name") == 'c$' AQL filter query
when the event matches Access Mask (custom) is any of 0x2
when the event matches "Subject Account Full Full Name" MATCHES '.*\$$' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SMB Create Remote File Admin Share on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
AND when the event matches LOWER("Share Full Full Name") == 'c$' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Access Mask (custom) is any of 0x2
AND NOT when the event matches "Subject Account Full Full Name" MATCHES '.*\$$' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: SMB Create Remote File Admin Share
Event description: Detects non-system accounts SMB accessing a file with write (0x2) access mask via administrative share (i.e C$).
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
